result.text: Scan: a trailer containing {n:1-3} horses, ears visible, tails active. They are watching the traffic with ancient patience. Attempt interspecies contact, or scan their destination?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

contact.text: Contact established. The lead horse regards our vessel. It is {pick:unimpressed|mildly curious|majestic beyond our instruments}. Offer it an honorary crew position?

crewed.text: The horse has accepted the rank of Honorary Cavalry Officer. It will never know this. That's what makes it noble, Captain.

free.text: Understood. The horse remains a free agent of the highway. It blinked once, slowly — the highest honor its kind bestows.

dest.text: Destination analysis: {pick:a competition it will win|greener actual pastures|a farrier appointment it doesn't know about yet}. Godspeed, tall passenger.
